yes, thats something that is hard to explain .
this is why i explain my thinking process in details in the weekly post...
i describe what i see... i make notes.
and this is why i emphatize thinking not expecting any alog or model to work instead of us.
models are only there to me to process and organize datas, nothing more. 
the rest is thinking.

still not replace thinking
